---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for docknap
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

One-line summary of the feature.

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? What use case does it enable?

## Proposed solution

How should this work? Describe the user-facing behavior:

- New env var / label / endpoint / metric?
- New CLI flag?
- New config option?

If you have a sketch of the API, include it.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider, and why is the proposed one better?

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, or links to similar features in other projects.
